name: URL Pattern Filter
description: Filter URLs by pattern matching and HTTP status code validation

options.name: exclude_patterns
options.label: Exclude URL patterns
options.description: One regex pattern per line. URLs matching any pattern will be removed.

options.name: include_patterns
options.label: Include URL patterns
options.description: One regex pattern per line. If set, only matching URLs are kept.

options.name: check_status_codes
options.label: Check HTTP status codes
options.description: Send HEAD requests to verify URLs return 200.
